_note: Per-company brand system. Load alongside the brief so every reel shares one look. Referenced by both pipelines for color, type, logo, safe-areas, CTA, and mood.

type.pairing_note: one serif for big words, one bold sans for captions — do not mix more

safe_area._note: keep all text inside these insets — platform UI covers the edges

hook._note: first ~1.5s: biggest word/number/image on frame 1, no slow fade-in

captions._note: burn for sound-off viewing; keep inside safe_area.bottom

endcard._note: every video ends on the brand lock + CTA + a short audio sting
